publishedAbstract: The PVC is RWO and is not in use but can't be mounted and the error is: ``` Warning FailedMount 3m45s (x615 over 23h) kubelet Unable to attach or mount volumes: unmounted volumes=[elasticsearch-data], unattached volumes=[elasticsearch-data], failed to process volumes=[]: timed out waiting for the condition ```- Issue happens after doing a Rolling Update- Issue happens after doing a graceful shutdown [Graceful Shutdown](https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/openshift_container_platform/4.14/html/backup_and_restore/graceful-shutdown-cluster#graceful-shutdown_graceful-shutdown-cluster)
publishedTitle: ODF/OCP  kubelet  Unable to attach or mount volumes: unmounted volumes=
